case_title: PICCONI, CATHERINE J. VS EVANS, MICHAEL EDWARD

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, MICHAEL EDWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY PICCONI, CATHERINE J. AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, MICHAEL EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PICCONI, CATHERINE J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, MICHAEL EDWARD $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,740.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
